name: Paris
description: Paris is known for iconic landmarks, art museums, cafe culture, and walkable historic neighborhoods.

name: Vienna
description: Vienna blends imperial palaces, classical music heritage, coffeehouses, and elegant city boulevards.

name: Prague
description: Prague offers Gothic architecture, cobbled streets, river views, and strong value for city breaks.

name: Rome
description: Rome combines ancient ruins, major religious sites, neighborhood trattorias, and lively public squares.

name: Munich
description: Munich is a practical base for Bavarian culture, museums, beer gardens, and day trips toward the Alps.

name: Barcelona
description: Barcelona stands out for Gaudi architecture, Mediterranean energy, food markets, and beach access.
